title: MenuFramework menu
description: Appearance of a MenuFramework menu, loaded from plugins/<PluginName>/menus/<id>.yml. Behaviour is defined in the matching @Menu Java class.

title.description: Inventory title as a MiniMessage string.

buttons.description: Buttons keyed by logical id. Each key must match a @Button(id) in the class.

pagination.description: Present only for paginated menus (a class with a @Paginated method).

slot.description: Slot index, 0..rows*9-1. Ignored for navigation buttons (their slot comes from the mask).

material.description: A valid Bukkit Material name. Defaults to STONE when blank.

name.description: Display name as a MiniMessage string.

amount.description: Stack size. Values outside 1..64 are clamped to 1.

model-data.description: Custom model data id. 0 or negative means none.

mask.description: One string per row; each string is exactly 9 characters. Row count must equal rows. X=content, #=border, <=previous, >=next, space=empty. At least one X is required.

previous-button.description: Look of the previous-page control. Its slot comes from the mask '<'.

next-button.description: Look of the next-page control. Its slot comes from the mask '>'.
